Product.title: Product
Product.description: An electronic or smart appliance item in Zyro.lk store.

name.description: The brand and model name of the product.

description.description: Detailed description of product features and specs.

price.description: Current selling price in LKR (Sri Lankan Rupees).

imageUrl.description: Primary display image URL (fallback to high-quality unsplash or local image).

imageUrls.description: Additional image URLs for the product gallery.

isNew.description: Flag indicating if the product is a new arrival.

isFeatured.description: Flag indicating if the product is featured on the home page.

isBestSeller.description: Flag indicating if the product is a best seller.

count.description: Number of products in this category.

customerUid.description: Firebase Authentication uid of the purchaser, or 'guest' for guests.

customerPhone.description: WhatsApp contact number of the customer.

district.description: Sri Lankan district (e.g. Colombo, Gampaha, Kandy).

items.description: List of ordered items with productId, name, price, and quantity.

totalPrice.description: Total amount paid or payable in LKR.

paymentMethod.description: Payment option selected: 'cod' (Cash on Delivery) or 'whatsapp_confirm'.

role.description: Role of the user, e.g., 'customer' or 'admin'.

SupplierHub.title: Supplier Hub
SupplierHub.description: Supplier sources connected to Zyro.lk for stock and price sync.

name.description: Display name of the supplier source.

connectionStatus.description: Current link status: connected, disconnected, pending.

lastSync.description: Timestamp of the last attempted sync.

lastError.description: Last error message received during sync or 'None'.

priceChanges.description: Count of items with price updates.

stockChanges.description: Count of items with stock level updates.

imageChanges.description: Count of items with updated graphics.

pendingReviews.description: Count of pending changes needing admin review.

SupplierSyncLog.title: Supplier Sync Log
SupplierSyncLog.description: Audit trails and reports of background/manual supplier synchronization runs.

supplierName.description: Display name of the supplier source at sync time.

error.description: Failure reason if status is failed, else None.

triggeredBy.description: Who or what initiated the sync (e.g., Manual, Cron Job).

SupplierImportQueueItem.title: Supplier Import Queue Item
SupplierImportQueueItem.description: Realtime status tracking of individual automated supplier catalog downloads, parses, and extraction jobs.

id.description: Unique ID for the import queue task.

productName.description: Name of the product or feed file being imported.

importStatus.description: Current status of the import job.

downloadedImages.description: Number of images downloaded/processed so far.

errorMessage.description: Error message if status is Failed.

SupplierSources.title: Supplier Sources
SupplierSources.description: Registered external supplier connections for Zyro.lk.

id.description: Unique identifier of the supplier source.

websiteUrl.description: Base website URL of the supplier.

lastSync.description: Timestamp of last attempted synchronization, initialized to null.

/users/{userId}.description: User accounts data, including administrator configurations.

/supplierHub/{docId}.description: Supplier connection statuses and summary metrics.

/supplierSources/{docId}.description: Collection of saved supplier connections, status and sync metadata.

/supplierSyncLogs/{logId}.description: Historical sync logs from supplier feeds.

/supplier_import_queue/{id}.description: Collection of real-time supplier import queue tracking entries.
